name: Life Hack — Build Something Worth Remembering Even If It Fails
technique: reversal
platforms: [x]
tags: [life-hack, virality, relationships, business, worst-case]
source_month: "2024-07"
---

## Why It Works

It works because it's got virality naturally baked in. When you talk about your partner or relationships, people feel naturally inclined to ReTweet to signal to their partners too. But you can use this virality for nearly anything, like business.

## Template

Life hack:
[Do a Thing], [Set up a worst case scenario], you'd gladly [Do this thing still].

## Example

Life hack:
Build a business that, even if it failed, you'd gladly be remembered for.
